fields.title: Kalki 2898 AD
fields.description: A mythological sci-fi epic set in a dystopian future where an ancient prophecy collides with futuristic technology. The story follows the avatar of Vishnu in a post-apocalyptic world.

fields.title: Pushpa 2: The Rule
fields.description: Pushpa Raj expands his red sandalwood smuggling empire while facing new threats and enemies who challenge his iron rule.

fields.title: Mufasa: The Lion King
fields.description: The origin story of Mufasa, exploring his journey from orphaned cub to one of the most beloved kings in the Pride Lands.

fields.title: Devara Part 1
fields.description: A fearless man builds a legacy of respect in coastal Andhra, but his son must face a new era of challenges and danger.

fields.title: Oppenheimer
fields.description: The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer, the theoretical physicist who helped develop the first nuclear weapons during World War II.

fields.title: KGF Chapter 3
fields.description: The saga continues as Rocky faces new threats to his empire, with enemies rising from every corner of the globe.

fields.title: Animal Park
fields.description: The sequel to the blockbuster Animal continues the violent saga of Ranvijay Singh as he faces new enemies.

fields.title: Stree 3
fields.description: The beloved horror-comedy franchise returns with more supernatural chaos in Chanderi.
